description: Configure the 'Industrial Revolution Research Paper' assignment in the 'World History' (HIST201) course to use a Marking Guide for grading using admin credentials (admin / Admin1234!). Define and make ready a Marking Guide named 'Research Paper Standard Guide' with the following criteria: 'Historical Argument' (Max score: 40; Student description: 'Present a clear, debatable thesis supported by evidence.'; Marker description: 'Thesis must appear in the introduction. Check for synthesis of at least 3 sources.'), 'Critical Analysis' (Max score: 40; Student description: 'Analyze cause and effect relationships rather than just describing events.'; Marker description: 'Award full points only if they connect social changes to economic drivers.'), and 'Turabian Formatting' (Max score: 20; Student description: 'Correct use of footnotes and bibliography.'; Marker description: 'Check specifically for Ibid. usage and hanging indents.'). Include frequently used comments: 'Excellent integration of primary sources.' and 'Please review the Turabian citation style guide.'
